query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocrRawText IS NULL OR ocrRawText = '' OR ocrRawText = '{}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_ocr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocrRawText IS NOT NULL AND ocrRawText != '' AND ocrRawText != '{}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ocr
FROM line_receipts 
WHERE status = 'pending'
LIMIT 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN ocrRawText IS NULL OR ocrRawText = '' OR ocrRawText = '{}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_ocr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ocrRawText IS NOT NULL AND ocrRawText != '' AND ocrRawText != '{}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ocr
FROM line_receipts 
WHERE status = 'pending'
